name: cdk-budget-notifier

modules.name: cdk_budget_notifier

methods.name: cdk_budget_notifier.BudgetNotifier.__init__
documentation:
---
param application: If specified the application name will be added as tag filter.
param availability_zones: If specified the availability zones will be added as tag
  filter.
param cost_center: If specified the cost center will be added as tag filter.
param id: '-'
param limit: The cost associated with the budget threshold.
param notification_type: Whether the notification is for how much you have spent (ACTUAL)
  or for how much you're forecasted to spend (FORECASTED).
param recipients: Budget notifications will be sent to each of the recipients (e-mail
  addresses). A maximum of 10 recipients is allowed.
param scope: '-'
param service: If specified the service will be added as tag filter.
param threshold: The threshold value in percent (0-100).
param time_unit: The length of time until a budget resets the actual and forecasted
  spend.
param topic_arn: true
param unit: The unit of measurement that is used for the budget threshold, such as
  dollars or GB.
---

methods.name: cdk_budget_notifier.BudgetNotifierProps.__init__
documentation:
Configuration options of the <mailto:{@link> BudgetNotifier BudgetNotifier}.

```
param limit

The cost associated with the budget threshold.

param threshold

The threshold value in percent (0-100).

param unit

The unit of measurement that is used for the budget threshold, such as dollars or GB.

param application

If specified the application name will be added as tag filter.

param availability_zones

If specified the availability zones will be added as tag filter.

param cost_center

If specified the cost center will be added as tag filter.

param notification_type

Whether the notification is for how much you have spent (ACTUAL) or for how much you're forecasted to spend (FORECASTED).

param recipients

Budget notifications will be sent to each of the recipients (e-mail addresses). A maximum of 10 recipients is allowed.

param service

If specified the service will be added as tag filter.

param time_unit

The length of time until a budget resets the actual and forecasted spend.

param topic_arn

```

documentation: The cost associated with the budget threshold.

documentation: If specified the application name will be added as tag filter.

documentation: If specified the availability zones will be added as tag filter.

methods.name: cdk_budget_notifier.BudgetNotifierProps.cost_center
documentation: If specified the cost center will be added as tag filter.

methods.name: cdk_budget_notifier.BudgetNotifierProps.notification_type
documentation:
Whether the notification is for how much you have spent (ACTUAL) or for how much you're forecasted to spend (FORECASTED).

:see: http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-budgets-budget-notification.html#cfn-budgets-budget-notification-notificationtype

methods.name: cdk_budget_notifier.BudgetNotifierProps.recipients
documentation:
Budget notifications will be sent to each of the recipients (e-mail addresses).

A maximum of 10 recipients is allowed.

methods.name: cdk_budget_notifier.BudgetNotifierProps.service
documentation: If specified the service will be added as tag filter.

methods.name: cdk_budget_notifier.BudgetNotifierProps.time_unit
documentation:
The length of time until a budget resets the actual and forecasted spend.

:see: http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-budgets-budget-budgetdata.html#cfn-budgets-budget-budgetdata-timeunit
